title: 有馬記念の後に・耐え忍びし名将

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto dominates the year-end Grand Prix!
She stands at the highest peak, surpassing both
T.M. Opera O and the previous generation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is not by coincidence, or so Grass Wonder
believes. She relates Meisho Doto's win as
inevitable, a flower coming into full bloom while
hiding in the shadow of T.M. Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There is still a ways to go on her path to find true
confidence. Nonetheless...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The racer who sought hope at rock bottom has
emerged triumphant, becoming a beacon of hope
for many.
